headlines.headline: Relvon Fuels sees mixed results in supply chain optimization pilot program

sentiment.reasoning: The mixed results of the pilot program suggest neither a clear success nor a failure, leading to neutral market sentiment.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
